plannerInstruction: Use agent-dag-planner. Re-read current source, re-verify existing docs/plans, fill or correct plan gaps, emit mivia-agent-plan/v1 in .ai/plans, save the human implementation plan in docs/plans, and report PlanArtifact: <path>.
implementerInstruction: Use agent-plan-implementer. Start from a validated .ai/plans/*.plan.json, execute one DAG node at a time, stay inside node scope, run node verifiers, and run deep-bug-audit, test-coverage-audit, and adversarial-test-review loops for implementation nodes.
